name: 课程概览调整建议生成

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.item.json.body || {};
const overview = input.courseOverview || {};

return {
  courseTitle: input.courseTitle || overview.courseTitle || '',
  theme: input.theme || overview.theme || '',
  age: input.age || '',
  duration: input.duration || '',
  scale: input.scale || '',
  vocabulary: Array.isArray(input.vocabulary) ? input.vocabulary.join(', ') : (input.vocabulary || ''),
  grammar: Array.isArray(input.grammar) ? input.grammar.join(', ') : (input.grammar || ''),
  skills: Array.isArray(input.skills) ? input.skills.join(', ') : (input.skills || ''),
  paths: Array.isArray(input.paths) ? input.paths.join(', ') : (input.paths || ''),
  storyContext: input.storyContext || overview.overallContext || '',
  keyOutcome: input.keyOutcome || overview.finalTask || '',
  selGoals: overview.selGoals || '',
  permaGoals: overview.permaGoals || ''
};
